scope: AgenC agents/thread-manager.ts ↔ codex codex-rs/core/src/thread_manager.rs strict parity

requiredBehaviors: ThreadManager holds the live registry of managed threads keyed by ThreadId
tracks rootSession and routes session-scoped operations through it
exposes registerSpawnedThread / removeManagedThread for AgentControl spawn/release callbacks
owns the unbounded shutdown queue used by shutdownAll
ManagedThread interface exposes the Session handle, status BehaviorSubject, mailbox handles, and cancellation surface used by AgentControl
AgenCThread implements ManagedThread for the live runtime; tests can supply their own implementation
registerSpawnedThread admits a new ManagedThread under its ThreadId
ThreadManagerOp dispatch matches codex's Op set: SendInput, AppendMessage, Interrupt, Shutdown, Status
removeManagedThread closes session lifecycle in correct order (shutdown -> close mailboxes -> remove from registry)
shutdownAll iterates current managed set with a bounded timeout per thread
ThreadShutdownReport returned summarizes per-thread outcome; matches codex's structured shutdown report
subscribers can register a ThreadCreatedListener invoked synchronously after a new ManagedThread is registered
matches codex's hook surface for runtime observers of new spawns
